text:
Most creators treat content like a treadmill — run every day or fall off.  

The smarter move? Build a feedback loop. Let yesterday’s best post teach your system what to write tomorrow. I automated that with free tools and the official Meta API. Now my account recycles its own winners, tweaks them, and posts better versions without me lifting a finger.  

No blank text boxes. No guesswork. Just a system that compounds.
